title: Build winning teams with holistic 360 evaluation
text:
# Build winning teams with holistic 360 evaluation

With Mercer | Mettl, effectively measure employee performance and potential to boost your business success

Find out how

# Build winning teams with holistic 360 evaluation

## People analytics to power smart employee decisions

Customizable and easy-to-use tools to help you measure your talent development needs

### Reskilling and upskilling

![]()

Reskilling-and-Upskilling

Identify gaps in skills and personality traits of your employees and build the right talent with the right capabilities

![]()

Reskilling-and-Upskilling

### High-potential identification

![]()

Performance-appraisal

Identify your most valuable employees who possess extraordinary intellect, agility and leadership

![]()

Performance-appraisal

### Performance appraisal

![]()

High-potential-identification

Gain a holistic and objective perspective on employees before undertaking appraisal exercises

![]()

High-potential-identification

### Succession planning

![]()

Succession-planning

Utilize 360-degree evaluation to evaluate and build a healthy bench of future successors

![]()

Succession-planning

### Training needs identification

![]()

Training-needs-identification

Identify skills and personality traits that your workforce can develop for improved performance

![]()

Training-needs-identification

### Leadership development

![]()

Leadership-development

Identify and equip your top leaders with the right skills needed to help them lead efficiently

![]()

Leadership-development

## Simple and easy to deploy

Measure employee potential and performance with confidence

![]()

360-easy-deploy

Personalized development plan

##### User-friendly, customizable, and intuitive platform

Identify gaps in perception across the self, superiors, peers and subordinates

![]()

Banner

###### 1.

###### High completion rates

Auto-saved device agnostic assessments with auto-generated email reminders

* * *

###### 2.

###### Great user experience

Immersive and easy-to-use interface to track project status

* * *

###### 3.

###### Personalized surveys

Wide range of custom-built survey templates for different job roles and levels

* * *

###### 4.

###### Immersive insights

Unique insights based on the Johari window to enable objective people decisions

* * *

###### 5.

###### Actionable & custom reports

Personalized reports available in 12+ languages with individual development plans for each employee

* * *

![]()

Banner

## Immersive and insightful reports

###### Rating

Gain actionable insights into strengths and areas of improvement. Identify blind spots

###### Detailed feedback

Get detailed feedback with in-depth perceptions about the individual

###### Personal development plan

Highlight strengths, gaps and development activities to be done
